generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors deployed in physical building infrastructure collecting temperature data for transmission to Digital Twin via BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors deployed in physical building infrastructure collecting occupancy data for transmission to Digital Twin via BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model enriched with semantic metadata for BCS components (sensors, actuators, controllers)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework, BIMAuthoringTools
]

instance BIMMetadataDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMModel
]

instance HonoMiddlewareConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration data for Eclipse Hono IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMMetadataDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance DittoMiddlewareConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration data for Eclipse Ditto digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMMetadataDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and data ingestion from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and metadata handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for creating and maintaining Building Information Models used in monitoring and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for automated generation of deployable runtime artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational data for immediate status assessment"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight, OccupancyMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for lifecycle optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insight for optimizing energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight regarding visual comfort conditions in the building"
]

instance NonVisualHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to non-visual health effects from building operations"
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature status insight for facility management"
]

instance OccupancyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status insight for facility management"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from building operations simulation for lifecycle optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insight for building operations monitoring"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator within Building Control Systems receiving commands from Digital Twin to adjust HVAC operations"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller within Building Control Systems receiving commands from Digital Twin to adjust lighting systems"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building infrastructure in Living Lab case study"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin (e.g., HVAC or lighting commands) transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to the physical Building Control Systems (BCS) for bidirectional communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and the Digital Twin, with data exchange and service execution occurring continuously to ensure immediate response to operational changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points, where a central hub facilitates bidirectional data exchange between Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers, integrating real-time sensor data and control commands."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, refurbishment, and adaptation phases, with the Digital Twin maintaining continuous representation from initial planning through operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness, ensuring the Digital Twin accurately reflects its physical counterpart's behavior and data consistency."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for secure communication between physical assets and the Digital Twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC) and standardized data schemas for semantic integration, with extension points for modular service interoperability across AECO workflows."
]
